baseSpans.name: execute_event_loop_cycle
baseSpans.input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use both the get_weather tool AND the get_time tool for Tokyo. Call both tools exactly once each.
